// Imports des images de sneakers
import airMax from '../assets/sneakers/airMax.jpg';

import basketsPatch from '../assets/sneakers/basketsPatch.jpg';
import urbanStreet from '../assets/sneakers/urbanStreet.jpg';
import airForce from '../assets/sneakers/airForce.jpg';

export const sneakersList = [
  {
    id: '1',
    nom: 'Air Max Isla Sandal',
    marque: 'Nike',
    prix: 69.95,
    style: 'Casual',
    esthetique: 4,
